title: Robinhood Chain tops $430 million in TVL, FalconX sees RWAs as the key differentiator
message_html: Robinhood Chain tops $430 million in TVL, FalconX sees RWAs as the key differentiator ...
snippet: Robinhood Chain hit $431M TVL and 250K+ daily users in under three weeks, but memecoins account for 80% of its $9B DEX volume, FalconX says.

title: Morpho launches fixed-rate lending protocol Midnight on Base to expand onchain credit markets
message_html: Morpho launches fixed-rate lending protocol Midnight on Base to expand onchain credit markets ...
snippet: Morpho has launched Midnight, a fixed-rate, fixed-term lending protocol on Base that complements its existing variable-rate lending protocol.
